canonical_question: Which ERP systems dominate in retail, manufacturing, professional services, healthcare, and construction?
constraints: Market share data shifts annually; vendor rankings reflect 2025-2026 positioning and may change with acquisitions or product pivots
Industry sub-verticals (e.g., discrete vs. process manufacturing) have distinct requirements that this overview simplifies
Company size, existing tech stack, and budget override industry vertical as selection criteria in some cases
Regional availability varies; some vendors dominate in North America but have limited presence in APAC or EMEA
Requires understanding of company-specific operational complexity before applying industry-level recommendations

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs detailed ERP feature comparison for a specific vendor
User is evaluating build-vs-buy for custom ERP
User needs ERP implementation methodology, not vendor selection

often_confused_with.label: ERP Vendor Comparison Framework (feature-level, not industry-level)

inputs_needed.question: What industry is the company in?
What is the company's approximate annual revenue?
